title: athyrium ebeneum
intro: Athyrium ebeneum, also known as the Black Spleenwort or Black Lady Fern, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium ebeneum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, Athyrium ebeneum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to reap its medicinal benefits.
